scripts.build: concurrently "npm run build:designer" "npm run build:runtime" "npm run build:tests" -r
scripts.vs:buildAndTest: npm run build && npm run vs:test
scripts.vs:test: nyc -r cobertura -r lcov -r text-summary mocha test/**/*.test.js -- --timeout 5000 --exit -r mocha-multi-reporters -r mocha-junit-reporter --reporter-options mochaFile=./test/test-results.xml
scripts.watch: npm run build:runtime -- -w | mocha --timeout 5000 --exit --reporter min -w test/**/*.test.js
